diagrams.title: Basic Logic Gates and Symbols
diagrams.description: Symbols for AND, OR, NOT, NAND, NOR, XOR, XNOR gates with their Boolean expressions
elements: AND Gate (·) - Flat back, curved front
OR Gate (+) - Curved back, pointed front
diagrams.purpose: Learn gate symbols and their corresponding Boolean operations for circuit design

diagrams.title: 2-Variable Karnaugh Map
diagrams.description: Layout showing minterm numbers and variable labels for a 2-variable K-map
elements: Cell contents: m0(00), m1(01), m2(10), m3(11)
diagrams.purpose: Understand K-map structure and how to fill cells for Boolean simplification

diagrams.title: 3-Variable Karnaugh Map
diagrams.description: Complete 3-variable K-map with Gray code arrangement
elements: Variable labels on axes: A,B on rows; C on columns
diagrams.purpose: Practice filling and grouping in 3-variable K-map problems

diagrams.title: De Morgan's Theorem Visualization
diagrams.description: Visual representation of both De Morgan's theorems with gate implementation
elements: (AB)' = A' + B' - shown with NAND gate equivalent
(A+B)' = A' · B' - shown with NOR gate equivalent
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how to convert between AND-OR and OR-AND forms using complemented inputs
